wjake 0.1.0

Personalized gt theme

Source: R/gt-theme-wjake.R
gt_theme_wjake.Rd

A custom theme for tables generated with gt::gt().

Usage

gt_theme_wjake(data, bg_color = "#F0F0F0", font_size = 16, ...)

Arguments

data

The gt table data object.

bg_color

The background color of the table.

font_size

The base font size for the table.

...

Additional arguments passed to gt_theme_apa() and gt::tab_options().

Value

An object of class gt_tbl.

Examples

gt::gt(head(penguins)) |>
  gt_theme_wjake()



  
species
      island
      bill_len
      bill_dep
      flipper_len
      body_mass
      sex
      year
    
Adelie
Torgersen
